label: Background video
description: Full-viewport background webm (e.g. 1920×1080). Lowest z, autoplay, muted, loop.

props.name: poster
props.description: Optional fallback image when video fails or is unsupported. Omit to stream video immediately without a poster frame.

label: Background image
description: Full-viewport background image (local). Lowest z, canvas-drawn, cover fit.

label: Background (variable / Figma-style)
description: Stack N layers: colors, gradients (linear/radial), blend modes (multiply, screen, overlay, etc.). Full viewport each.

label: Background pattern
description: Full-viewport tiled image from CDN. Canvas-drawn with createPattern; repeat, repeat-x, repeat-y, or no-repeat.

label: Background transition
description: Crossfade transition between two background elements. Triggered by trigger action, time delay, or scroll position.

props.name: duration
props.description: Transition duration in milliseconds. Only needed when mode is 'time' (required for time-based transitions)

props.name: mode
props.description: Transition mode: 'progress' = scroll-driven (instant opacity changes), 'time' = CSS transition with duration. Defaults to 'progress' if progressRange is set, otherwise 'time'

props.name: trigger
props.description: Trigger action that initiates the transition (e.g., onVisible/onInvisible from a section)

props.name: time
props.description: Time delay in milliseconds before transition starts

props.name: position
props.description: Scroll position trigger - number (pixels) or string (percentage like '50%')

props.name: progress
props.description: Progress value (0-1) for smooth transition. Can be from section onProgress trigger (section scroll progress) or page onPageProgress trigger (page scroll progress).

props.name: progressRange
props.description: Progress range: map page/section progress to transition progress. e.g., { start: 0.2, end: 0.8 } means transition happens between 20% and 80% of scroll. If not specified, uses full 0-1 range.
